name: Sakuyamon: Miko Mode

signature_move.name: Izuna
signature_move.description: Summons 4 mystical fox spirits that are imbued with the powers of fire, water, wind and thunder that obey and fight for Sakuyamon.

description: A form Sakuyamon takes when it performs Shinto rituals and listens to God 's will. It seldom fights in Miko Mode , but has strengthened its ability to exorcise evil spirits.
